creator: oliver@akephalos.de
text:
Sorry it hasn't got anything to do with the game itself, it depends on
the sound device. I'm using HDA onboard, but while testing it with a
Soundblaster Audigy 4 (snd_emu10kx) I can play all of the sounds. So
it's a problem with snd_hda.

Cheers, Oliver
--
